compiled_state.title: Create intent-search agent definition
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md defining the intent search sub-agent prompt. The agent:
- Receives a bug ticket ID and searches: closed/archived tickets, git history on affected files, ADRs/design docs, code comments
- Uses specific-to-general keyword strategy starting from the bug error message/title
- Is timeboxed to debug.intent_search_budget tool calls (passed in dispatch prompt)
- Emits gate signal JSON conforming to gate-signal-schema.md contract (from story 4b97-bd9d): gate_id "1a", signal_type "primary", triggered true/false, evidence summary, confidence
- Three terminal outcomes: intent-aligned (triggered false, confidence high/medium), intent-contradicting (triggered true), ambiguous (triggered false, confidence low)
- Contradictory partial evidence returns ambiguous (fail toward dialog)

Note: gate-signal-schema.md is a forward reference from story 4b97-bd9d (story-level dependency exists). The agent definition references the schema by name but does not require the file to exist at creation time.

test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 3 — Markdown agent prompt (static asset). Behavioral testing of LLM agents requires eval fixtures (out of scope for unit tests). Structural contract tests for agent output schema are deferred — the gate-signal-schema contract + validate-gate-signal.py (story 4b97-bd9d) provide schema enforcement at runtime.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md
- [ ] Agent references gate signal schema contract
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-signal-schema' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md
- [ ] Agent defines three terminal outcomes
  Verify: grep -q 'intent-aligned' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md && grep -q 'intent-contradicting' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md && grep -q 'ambiguous' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md
- [ ] Agent specifies budget constraint
  Verify: grep -q 'intent_search_budget' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md
- [ ] Agent defines required gate signal fields
  Verify: grep -q 'gate_id' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md && grep -q 'signal_type' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md && grep -q 'triggered' plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — static asset) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 5 AC checks pass: file exists, gate-signal-schema referenced, three terminal outcomes defined (intent-aligned/intent-contradicting/ambiguous), budget constraint (intent_search_budget) specified, required gate signal fields (gate_id/signal_type/triggered) present.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
